edges.evidence: Folk Nation — c. 1979 – 2000 or later
Ambrose had no war with Rampants or Spartans and were close allies
Ambrose had no war with Rampants or Spartans and were close allies
One of Ambrose main reasons for coming together was because the Taylor Street Dukes were harassing them as was the many Italian allies of the Dukes.

Reno "Maniac Mouse" Enriquez of the Latin Counts from address 1619 S. Loomis (17th and Loomis) shot Louie Limas to death. The death of Louie Limas was devastating and caused a lot of anger from Ambrose toward Latin Counts, the war intensified since Limas' death.
Ambrose and the Skulls were good friends until the Vietnam War destroyed the Skulls and caused them to go extinct in 1971, the rest of the Skulls flipped to Ambrose
In 1986 Ambrose was at war with Satan Disciples and since then the war has been violent
Both Ambrose and Satan Disciples would become part of the Folks alliance in the late 70s/early 80s and would even form the "ATSD" which stood for "Ambrose Two Six and Satan Disciples."

Black Gangster Disciples connected with the Ashland Vikings, a mostly Puerto Rican group, the Simon City Royals, a mostly white group and Ambrose, a mostly Mexican group. Black Gangster Disciples would pay Ambrose members to go out and kill one of their enemies... The gangs also trafficked weapons and drugs together and this built a deep connection between Ambrose, Gangster Disciples and Simon City Royals.

Black Gangster Disciples connected with the Ashland Vikings, a mostly Puerto Rican group, the Simon City Royals, a mostly white group and Ambrose, a mostly Mexican group... The gangs also trafficked weapons and drugs together and this built a deep connection between Ambrose, Gangster Disciples and Simon City Royals. In the late 80s Ambrose and Simon City Royals became even tighter. The Simon City Royals offered Ambrose to join the north side Folks alliance in 1994, this is when Ambrose became "Almighty Ambrose."
Ambrose and Two Six became great allies when Two Six formed in 1970 and this alliance would continue into the 80s when both gangs joined Folks and the ATSD was effective.
War broke out in 1986 when Two Six gunned down Two Two Boys and Satan Disciples at a Ambrose party even though Ambrose was the target.

Two Two Boys and Ambrose became very close in the midst of all this which turned them into "cousins" on the streets. Two Two Boys and Ambrose didn't have any official relations like "Insane" or "Gangster" because Ambrose did not want to be bound to anything besides Folks, Two Boys were the only group that respected that; therefore, they had a very tight relationship for many years.

Ambrose and KGBs did not get along with Black Disciples because they kept encroaching on KGB and Ambrose sections... BDs were infringing on Ambrose at 62nd and Sacramento but Ambrose pushed BDs out of this area by using violence.
a prominent Ambrose flipped to Party Players and brought them into the hood which resulted in a bloody war
As soon as the Party People formed in 1980, Party People were immediately at odds with Ambrose. No war would start until 1981 when Ambrose stabbed the Party People founder to death.
Ambrose would go to war with the "Rec City" Gangster Disciples in the 2000s because Rec City at 63rd & Albany is in Ambrose hood, this brought a violent gang war.
Ambrose and KGBs went to war in the 2000s and the war was too costly for KGBs so they withdrew and Ambrose would advance to 64th Street in 2012
When this war began Ambrose and La Raza called a truce because of their mutual hate for Party People and both gangs have been on good terms since 1995.
Before Blue Water Ambrose was engaging in a violent war with La Raza, a gang that resided on another side of Pilsen to the south.
eventually Ambrose of 21st was at war with Bishops that moved into the area
Ambrose would clash heavily with Latin Kings from West Pilsen

Instead of starting a chapter of Ambrose in the neighborhood these Ambrose started their own crew called the "Very Mellow People."...VMPs began to flip to Ambrose right away until VMPs went extinct in 1997.
this pushed out the Akrohs, a Asian gang in the area of 61st to 62nd and from California to Mozart
Ambrose did not have many allies in the 70s through the 90s in Pilsen besides the Morgan Boys and Racine Boys by the early 80s

Ambrose had wars with Latin Counts, Morgan Deuces, Latin Kings

description: Ambrose is a Mexican-American street gang founded in 1958 on Chicago's south side, originally formed in response to harassment from the Taylor Street Dukes. The gang expanded significantly from the 1980s onward to multiple Chicago neighborhoods, suburbs, and other cities, becoming one of the larger Folk Nation-affiliated organizations. Ambrose has been involved in extensive drug trafficking, weapons trade, and violent conflicts with numerous rival gangs throughout its history.
